prompt: Debug missing RoofShingles material and provide corrected getMaterial() cache pattern + traverse() assignment.

assertions.text: getMaterial(name, options) cache pattern used — material is not created with bare `new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial()` each time
MeshStandardMaterial with color #2F2F2F, roughness 0.9, metalness 0.0 specified correctly
model.traverse() or group.traverse() used to walk the roof mesh tree and apply the material
Debug checklist covers at least: renderer.info memory check, castShadow/receiveShadow flags, material.name verification
Replaced/old material disposal mentioned to prevent GPU memory leaks
